23.reason: Error: rear starts at 999, so first increment makes it 1000, out of bounds for array size 1000 (indices 0-999).

50.reason: [error: rear should be initialized to -1 (or 0) to avoid out-of-bounds write; setting to 999 causes first enQueue to write to Q[1000] which is outside the array of size 1000]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [error: rear should be initialized to -1 (or 0) to avoid out-of-bounds write; setting to 999 causes first enQueue to write to Q[1000] which is outside the array of size 1000]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [rear is initialized to 999, which causes the first enQueue to write at index 1000, exceeding Q's size of 1000 (valid indices: 0-999). Also, this breaks the circular queue logic and leads to incorrect BFS behavior.]
